props.name: feedbackValid
props.description: Provide valuable, actionable invalid feedback when using standard HTML form validation which applied two CSS pseudo-classes, `:invalid` and `:valid`.

props.name: floatingLabel
props.description: Provide valuable, actionable valid feedback when using standard HTML form validation which applied two CSS pseudo-classes, `:invalid` and `:valid`.

props.name: htmlSize
props.description: Specifies the number of visible options in a drop-down list.

props.name: id
props.description: The id global attribute defines an identifier (ID) that must be unique in the whole document.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Set component validation state to invalid.

props.name: label
props.description: Add a caption for a component.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: The default name for a value passed using v-model.

props.name: options
props.description:
Options list of the select component. Available keys: `label`, `value`, `disabled`.
Examples:
- `:options="[{ value: 'js', label: 'JavaScript' }, { value: 'html', label: 'HTML', disabled: true }]"`
- `:options="['js', 'html']"`

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small or large.

props.name: text
props.description: Add helper text to the component.

props.name: tooltipFeedback
props.description: Display validation feedback in a styled tooltip.

props.name: valid
props.description: Set component validation state to valid.

events.name: change
events.description: Event occurs when when a user changes the selected option of a `<select>` element.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emit the new value whenever there’s a change event.
